section.heading: Review and adjustment of classifications, grades, and pay level
section.chapeau: An employee may request at any time that the employee’s agency—

paragraph.content: review the classification of the employee’s position or the grade or pay level for the employee’s position, or both; and
revise or adjust that classification, grade or pay level, or both, as the case may be.

section.continuation: The request for review and revision or adjustment shall be submitted and adjudicated in accordance with the regularly established appeals procedures of the agency.
